skills.name: nextjs-16
skills.description: Next.js 16 App Router conventions: routing, layouts, server vs client components, async params, and path aliases.

skills.name: nextjs-server-actions
skills.description: How to write, structure, and consume Next.js Server Actions for all mutations in this project.

skills.name: nextjs-data-fetching
skills.description: Server-side data fetching with dedicated fetcher functions under lib/data/, parallel fetches, and cache revalidation.

skills.name: supabase-auth-rls
skills.description: Supabase Auth setup, session management, admin auth guard (assertAdmin), and Row-Level Security conventions.

skills.name: shadcn-usage
skills.description: How to use Shadcn UI components (Button, Input, Badge, Card, Dialog), icons with lucide-react, and Tailwind CSS v4 design tokens.

skills.name: senior-frontend-guidelines
skills.description: Senior-level conventions for component architecture, TypeScript, error handling, loading states, accessibility, and imports.

skills.name: forms-zod
skills.description: Form validation with Zod: schema definitions, safeParse in server actions, useActionState in client forms, and cross-field validation.

skills.name: admin-tables
skills.description: Admin data tables with TanStack Table: column definitions, row actions with edit/delete dialogs, status badges, and filtering.
